title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: December 14, 2023
summary: December 14 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , and at a greater rate of 7.83% (from last week’s growth rate of 6.29%), from the level on 12/07/2023 of 11.111 M km 2 to 12.055 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Reso...
